summary: 007-themed game project with an intro sequence, mission page, and start screen. User is iterating on the opening load sequence and UI controls.

existing_features.title: Add a controls reference panel to the start/mission screen that displays the game controls (WASD movement, mouse aim/shoot, Space to jump or interact, and any other relevant keybindings) so players can see them before starting the game.

new_feature_requests.summary: Revert to original opening load sequence
Add controls display to start screen

Revert the InitialLoadingScreen component to the original Bond-themed gun barrel loading animation and intro sequence, removing any extended duration changes introduced in recent versions. Restore the original minimum display time, animation timing, and visual elements.
